content.en:
Although Ye Tian didn't know the true situation of the Ancient Well Vision, the Chaos Origin Divine Well formed after the Ancient Well Dao Vision was integrated into the fragments of the Origin Well was indeed very powerful, and it was also his strongest defense method at present.

However, he didn't know if this defensive method could be improved or cultivated, if he could continue to improve, it would definitely be one of his strongest methods in the future.

If he can't improve, it's enough to become one of his helpers in a short period of time.

In short, this time it is considered to be a big profit.

"It's a pity, I still can't kill this top Source Emperor!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

This Colorful Divine Cow Source Emperor is not only powerful, but also very terrifying in physical defense, almost the ultimate in the realm of the Source Emperor, if it is purely about physical strength, the physical bodies of those supreme beings in the Twelve Universe Era are not as good as this top Source Emperor!

If Ye Tian wanted to kill this Source Emperor, unless there was still some hope in the outside world, but when the Origin Realm was suppressed, his attack power would not be able to break through the defense of this top Source Emperor at all.

It can even be said that this colorful sacred cow stood there and let him attack for a year, and he couldn't kill it.

"It's almost, Aurora has escaped far away, and this colorful sacred cow has no means of pursuit, so it shouldn't be able to catch up. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, he kept teleporting away.

And after the Colorful Divine Cow couldn't sense the existence of the aurora, it attacked wildly nearby, destroying the land in this area, and also causing many source beasts to be poisoned.

And all this has nothing to do with Ye Tian, and he is far away.

......

The other side.

The aurora flew for a long time before it stopped.

"Whew, finally got rid of the Colorful Sacred Cow!" Aurora muttered.

He felt that he was lucky to meet Ye Tian, otherwise he really couldn't get rid of the Colorful Divine Cow.

"I don't know what happened to the Ten Thousand Law Divine Lord, it shouldn't matter with his strength, right?" Aurora said darkly.

It didn't take long for a figure to appear in his sight, and it was Ye Tian.

Aurora saw that Ye Tian was able to catch up, it was not unusual at all, after all, Ye Tian was proficient in time and space and soul, and he was in a hurry to fly along the way, and he did not clear the traces, so Ye Tian was able to catch up, but once the Colorful Divine Cow with a single means was lost, it would be difficult to chase it up.

Seeing Ye Tian flying over, Aurora took out a picture from the small universe.

"Ten Thousand Laws Divine Lord, this is the reward!"

Aurora handed the picture over.

Ye Tian took it over, took a closer look, and found that this was a top-level treasure of the space class.

"This is the top treasure - the floating map, which contains the Thirteen Floating Realms, which has the effect of suppressing seals, and the Floating Thirteen Realms can be accelerated by 100 times, and can also be used to cultivate some medicinal herbs and spiritual plants. In addition, the Floating Diagram can increase the spatial power of a spatial cultivator, and it can increase the spatial attack a lot, which is a rare top-level treasure!"

Aurora introduced.

It stands to reason that he doesn't want to give up such a top-level treasure.

However, he promised Ye Tian a top-level treasure as a reward to save his life, so naturally it was not easy to regret it.

In fact, with his status, he naturally had more than one top-level treasure on his body, but it was precisely this precious space-type top-level treasure that had the least effect on him.

Because he is walking on the Avenue of Light, a top-level treasure like the Avenue of Light, he will definitely not give up, so he can only give up this top-level treasure of the space class.

Looking at the top-level treasure of the space class in his hand, the floating map, Ye Tian showed a satisfied look: "Thank you!"

"Lord of Ten Thousand Laws, since the reward has been given, let's leave it at that!"

Aurora Hold Your Fist.

So saying, he was leaving.

At this time, Ye Tian hurriedly called out to him: "Aurora, slow down!"

"Ten Thousand Laws Divine Lord, is there something else going on?"

Aurora asked.

"Aurora, why did that colorful divine cow chase and kill you, just now I kept blocking it, even attacking it, it didn't care, it just wanted to attack you, can you give an explanation?" Ye Tian asked.

Swish!

Aurora's face changed, and the light of his eyes changed many times.

But he reacted quickly, and immediately explained: "It was forcibly interrupted by me when it was promoted, so I was very angry, and I couldn't kill me!"

"Really?" Ye Tian sneered, "Aurora, your soul aura fluctuates a lot, it is obvious that what you just said is not true, originally with your state of mind and cultivation, it will not be like this, presumably there is something hidden involved." Don't worry, I'm not going to take any of your chances, I'm just curious. If I really wanted to take your chance, you're dead now!"

"I naturally believe in the Ten Thousand Laws Divine Lord, if the Ten Thousand Laws Divine Lord really wants to kill me, I can't live now!"

Aurora nodded.

"Say it!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

Aurora didn't dare to hide it anymore, he knew that if he made up another reason, if he was found out by Ye Tian again, it would be tantamount to offending Ye Tian at that time.

Maybe Ye Tian, who didn't want to do it, would also do it to him.

Immediately, he gritted his teeth and took out a small gray bead from the small universe in his body.

This small bead is an ordinary treasure of the forbidden class, except for the shielding aura is very powerful, there is nothing else special.

Swish!

Aurora made a seal and projected the scene inside the Forbidden Orb.

I saw a calf emitting a nine-colored light sleeping in the forbidden space.

"Source Beast cub!"

Ye Tian's pupils shrank, and he immediately understood why Aurora was chased and killed by the Colorful Divine Cow, it turned out that he had stolen other people's children, no wonder it caused others to chase and kill.

"Aurora, why did you steal the cubs of the Colorful Sacred Cow?"

Ye Tian was a little curious.

Aurora looked at Ye Tian and said with a smile: "The Ten Thousand Law Divine Lord doesn't know a little about the Origin Realm, the Origin Realm is very special, the Origin Beast here really can't leave the Origin Realm, but there is a situation that can take the Origin Beast to the power, that is, to contract with the cub and bring it out of the Origin Realm in the name of a war pet." If it is an ordinary cub, it is indeed of little value, because the source beast is only talented in the physical body, and it will be very difficult to cultivate other paths, although if the cub is cultivated well, it can also cultivate other paths, and even hope to comprehend the foundation of the Great Dao. But most of the cubs are worthless. After all, for a child of the era like us, it is certain to become a supreme, and a cub who cannot have supreme combat power is of no value. The Colorful Divine Cow is placed in the outside world, that is, it dominates the ultimate combat power, which is not as good as Tianzun. But its cub is different, but the bloodline of the nine-colored divine cow, it can be said that it is the cub of the Source Emperor, once it is cultivated into a Source Emperor at some cost, and then cultivates other ways, it is enough to have the top supreme combat power, or even higher combat power. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian suddenly realized.

In this way, the value of this nine-colored sacred cow cub is different, which is equivalent to a supreme in the future!

The value of the supreme-level war pet is comparable to that of the top supreme treasure, and it is even more cherished.

It's just that if you want to cultivate such a war pet, the price you pay is bound to be very large.

"Don't worry, I'm not going to covet your pet, but I want to ask you something!"

Ye Tiandao.

Aurora breathed a sigh of relief, if Ye Tian asked for it, although he was reluctant, he couldn't resist, now Ye Tian didn't want the colorful god cow cubs, this was undoubtedly the best result.

"Ten Thousand Laws Divine Lord, if I know, I will definitely tell you!"

Aurora assured.
